title: × elyhordeum bowes-lyonii
intro: × Elyhordeum bowes-lyonii, commonly known as Elymus bowes-lyonii, is a type of hybrid grass in the Poaceae family. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of × Elyhordeum bowes-lyonii include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
